channel.title: Vista Theater Hollywood
channel.description: Now playing at Vista Theater Hollywood — 35mm and 70mm presentations.

item.title: Disclosure Day
item.description:
If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This June, the truth belongs to seven billion people. We are coming close to … Disclosure Day.
Cast: Director: Steven Spielberg | Writers: David Koepp, Steven Spielberg | Stars: Emily Blunt, Josh O'Connor, Eve Hewson
Data: 2026
Durata: 145 minuti

Orari: June 20th Saturday ore 10:00 am, June 20th Saturday ore 2:00 pm, June 20th Saturday ore 6:00 pm, June 20th Saturday ore 10:15 pm, June 21st Sunday ore 10:00 am, June 21st Sunday ore 2:00 pm, June 21st Sunday ore 6:30 pm, June 22nd Monday ore 11:00 am, June 22nd Monday ore 3:00 pm, June 22nd Monday ore 7:30 pm, June 23rd Tuesday ore 11:00 am, June 23rd Tuesday ore 3:00 pm, June 23rd Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, June 24th Wednesday ore 11:00 am, June 24th Wednesday ore 3:00 pm, June 24th Wednesday ore 7:30 pm, June 25th Thursday ore 11:00 am, June 25th Thursday ore 3:00 pm, June 25th Thursday ore 7:30 pm

item.title: The Invite
item.description:
Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.
Cast: Director: Olivia Wilde | Writers: Rashida Jones, Will McCormack | Stars: Olivia Wilde, Seth Rogen, Penélope Cruz, Edward Norton
Data: 2026
Durata: 102 minuti

Orari: June 26th Friday ore 1:00 pm, June 26th Friday ore 4:15 pm, June 26th Friday ore 7:30 pm, June 26th Friday ore 11:00 pm, June 27th Saturday ore 1:15 pm, June 27th Saturday ore 4:15 pm, June 27th Saturday ore 7:30 pm, June 27th Saturday ore 11:00 pm, June 28th Sunday ore 1:15 pm, June 28th Sunday ore 4:15 pm, June 28th Sunday ore 7:30 pm, June 29th Monday ore 1:00 pm, June 29th Monday ore 4:15 pm, June 29th Monday ore 7:30 pm, June 30th Tuesday ore 1:00 pm, June 30th Tuesday ore 4:15 pm, June 30th Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, July 1st Wednesday ore 1:00 pm, July 1st Wednesday ore 4:15 pm, July 1st Wednesday ore 7:30 pm, July 2nd Thursday ore 1:00 pm, July 2nd Thursday ore 4:15 pm, July 2nd Thursday ore 7:30 pm

item.title: The Wild Party
item.description:
Wild girls at a college pay more attention to parties than their classes. But when one party girl, Stella Ames, goes too far at a local bar and lands in trouble, her professor must rescue her. Gossip linking the two escalates until Stella proves that she is decent by shielding an innocent girl and winning the professor's respect.
Cast: Director: Dorothy Arzner | Writers: Samuel Hopkins Adams, E. Lloyd Sheldon | Stars: Clara Bow, Fredric March
Data: 1929
Durata: 76 minuti

Orari: June 28th Sunday ore 10:00 am

item.title: Jaws
item.description:
When a gigantic great white shark begins to menace the small island community of Amity, a police chief, a marine scientist and grizzled fisherman set out to stop it.
Cast: Director: Steven Spielberg | Writers: Peter Benchley, Carl Gottlieb | Stars: Roy Scheider, Robert Shaw, Richard Dreyfuss
Data: 1975
Durata: 124 minuti

Orari: July 3rd Friday ore 11:30 pm, July 4th Saturday ore 10:00 am, July 4th Saturday ore 11:30 pm, July 5th Sunday ore 10:00 am

item.title: Dances with Wolves
item.description:
A lieutenant assigned to a remote Civil War outpost starts questioning his purpose after making contact with a neighboring Sioux settlement.
Cast: Director: Kevin Costner | Writers: Michael Blake | Stars: Kevin Costner, Mary McDonnell, Graham Greene
Data: 1990
Durata: 181 minuti

Orari: July 10th Friday ore 7:30 pm, July 11th Saturday ore 7:30 pm, July 12th Sunday ore 7:30 pm, July 13th Monday ore 7:30 pm, July 14th Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, July 15th Wednesday ore 7:30 pm

item.title: Hollywood 90028
item.description:
A struggling photographer takes a job in the porn industry. Unable to handle the degradation, he begins murdering young women to vent his frustrations.
Cast: Director: Christina Hornisher | Writers: Christina Hornisher | Stars: Christopher Augustine, Jeannette Dilger, Dick Glass
Data: 1973
Durata: 87 minuti

Orari: July 10th Friday ore 11:59 pm, July 11th Saturday ore 11:59 pm

item.title: Snoopy Come Home
item.description:
When Snoopy receives a letter from a girl named Lila, who's in a hospital, he goes on a journey with Woodstock to see her.
Cast: Director: Bill Melendez | Writers: Charles M. Schulz | Stars: Chad Webber, Robin Kohn, Stephen Shea
Data: 1972
Durata: 81 minuti

Orari: July 11th Saturday ore 10:00 am, July 12th Sunday ore 10:00 am

item.title: The Odyssey
item.description:
After the Trojan War, Odysseus faces a dangerous voyage back to Ithaca, meeting creatures like the Cyclops Polyphemus, Sirens, and Calypso along the way.
Cast: Director: Christopher Nolan | Writers: Christopher Nolan | Stars: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Lupita Nyong'o, Zendaya, Charlize Theron
Data: 2026
Durata: 172 minuti

Orari: July 16th Thursday ore 2:00 pm, July 16th Thursday ore 7:30 pm (Sold Out), July 17th Friday ore 10:00 am, July 17th Friday ore 2:00 pm, July 17th Friday ore 6:20 pm (Sold Out), July 17th Friday ore 10:30 pm, July 18th Saturday ore 10:00 am, July 18th Saturday ore 2:00 pm, July 18th Saturday ore 6:20 pm, July 18th Saturday ore 10:30 pm, July 19th Sunday ore 10:00 am, July 19th Sunday ore 2:30 pm, July 19th Sunday ore 7:00 pm, July 20th Monday ore 11:00 am, July 20th Monday ore 3:00 pm, July 20th Monday ore 7:30 pm, July 21st Tuesday ore 11:00 am, July 21st Tuesday ore 3:00 pm, July 21st Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, July 22nd Wednesday ore 11:00 am, July 22nd Wednesday ore 3:00 pm, July 22nd Wednesday ore 7:30 pm, July 23rd Thursday ore 11:00 am, July 23rd Thursday ore 3:00 pm, July 23rd Thursday ore 7:30 pm

item.title: The Fast and the Furious (25th Anniversary)
item.description:
Los Angeles street racer Dominic Toretto falls under the suspicion of the LAPD as a string of high-speed electronics truck robberies rocks the area. Brian O'Connor, an officer of the LAPD, joins the ranks of Toretto's highly skilled racing crew undercover to convict Toretto. However, O'Connor finds himself both enamored with this new world and in love with Toretto's sister, Mia. As a rival racing crew gains strength, O'Connor must decide where his loyalty really lies.
Cast: Director: Rob Cohen | Writers: Ken Li, Gary Scott Thompson, Erik Bergquist | Stars: Stars Vin Diesel Paul Walker Michelle Rodriguez
Data: 2001
Durata: 106 minuti

Orari: August 21st Friday ore 1:00 pm, August 21st Friday ore 4:15 pm, August 21st Friday ore 7:30 pm, August 22nd Saturday ore 1:15 pm, August 22nd Saturday ore 4:15 pm, August 22nd Saturday ore 7:30 pm, August 23rd Sunday ore 2:00 pm, August 23rd Sunday ore 7:00 pm, August 24th Monday ore 4:00 pm, August 24th Monday ore 7:30 pm, August 25th Tuesday ore 4:00 pm, August 25th Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, August 26th Wednesday ore 4:00 pm, August 26th Wednesday ore 7:30 pm, August 27th Thursday ore 4:00 pm, August 27th Thursday ore 7:30 pm
